Stage 1
/ until 12 a.m. UTC on September 6
Live

0d : 15h : 52m : 37s

Welcome to the first stage of Venom Community Incentive Program Season 3! Complete tasks and earn XP. At the end of the season, participants will receive $VENOM and additional rewards. The first stage will conclude on 6 September 2024.

Tweet about Venom Network Season 3

10000XP

Join the celebration of Season 3 launch by creating a Twitter post about @venom_network_. The tweet will be auto-generated.

Retweet Venom Network’s tweet

5000XP

Support Venom Network by Retweeting the post about Season 3 launch.

Invite a new friend!

10000XP

Earn XP for referring a friend when they create a new Venom Wallet. Use your own referral link to track the invites.

Share your referral link with your friends to earn add itional XP and keep climbing the leaderboard together!

This task will not be counted in your referrals % share.

More info

Check out Reform DAO!

10000XP

Reform is the first market making and liquidity providing DAO leveraging AI whilst aligning incentives across all stakeholders within the market making process.

How to do it:


  1. Follow Reform DAO on X: https://x.com/reformdao
  2. Join Reform DAO Telegram Channel: https://t.me/Reformportal
  3. Come back here and press “Check”
More info

Check out Empty Dusk!

5000XP

Empty Dusk is an NFT collection of forbidden beings roaming on Venom Network. We're a community centric project, with the sole aim of expanding and growing our outreach and on-boarding users to Venom Network.


How to do it:


  1. Follow Empty Dusk on X: https://x.com/duskonvenom
  2. Come back here and press “Check”
More info

Check Out Crazy Camels!

10000XP

You're a CRAZY CAMEL dashing wildly across the desert and earning TOKENS! Use boosts, invite friends, complete tasks, and unleash your boundless energy!

How to do it:


  1. Launch Crazy Camels game: link
  2. Complete “Follow our channel” task
  3. Come back here and press “Check”
More info

Check out CityHolder!

10000XP

CITY Holder – the first game in the Build-to-Earn genre A multiplayer game on the Telegram platform that combines elements of economic strategy, management, and social activities, offering a simple yet interesting system of development and interaction with other players.

Players, acting as Holders, build and develop their cities, striving to maximize the population to earn in-game tokens $CITY. The main aspects of the game include building structures, collecting taxes, completing tasks, and attracting residents, which directly affects the players' positions in the Holder rankings and their real income from the game in the form of seasonal drops.


How to:


  1. Launch City Holder game: link
  2. Complete “Follow our channel” task
  3. Come back here and press “Check”
More info

Check out DotCoin!

10000XP

Tap on the DOT and earn your coins. A little bit later you will be very surprised. Got friends? Invite them to the game. That’s the way you'll both earn even more coins together.

How to:


  1. Launch DotCoin game: link
  2. Complete “Follow our channel” task
  3. Come back here and press “Check”
More info

Follow partner

1500XP

Follow Venom Network’s KOL partners on Socials to earn additional XP.


Rules:

Follow our partner on Socials.


How to do it:


  1. Click on the link
  2. Press “Follow” on X or Telegram page
  3. Return to this page and press “Check”

  3. Return to this page and press “Check”
More info

Stake $VENOM on VenomStake

24h Volume task
1$-10XP

Stake $VENOM on venomstake.com & hold $StVENOM.

Rules:


  1. The volume will be calculated at the end of each day (12 AM UTC time).
  2. Volume values will be rounded down to the nearest whole number. For example, if you hold $StVENOM worth $5.99 daily, your reward will be rounded down to holding $5 worth $StVENOM = 25 XP. $6.00 worth of $StVENOM = 30 XP, etc.
  3. We check the balance several times a day and accrue XP based on the lowest figures for the day. Do not transfer $StVENOM if you want to guarantee receiving XP.

How to do it:

  1. Go to the venomstake.com
  2. Connect Venom wallet.
  3. Choose the amount of VENOM tokens you want to stake and click "Stake."
  4. XP will be credited and the task will be marked as done at the end of the day (12 AM UTC time).
More info

Provide liquidity on Web3.World

24h Volume task
1$-5XP

Earn 5 XP for every $1 provided in liquidity on a daily basis.

Rules:


  1. XP will be credited at the end of the day (12 AM UTC time) as long as you continue to provide liquidity.
  2. We do not count liquidity that is in farming.
  3. Volume values will be rounded down to the nearest whole number. For example, if you provide liquidity worth $10.99 daily, your reward will be rounded down to holding $10 worth $StVENOM = 50 XP. $11.00 worth of $StVENOM = 55 XP, etc.
  4. We check the balance several times a day and accrue XP based on the lowest figures for the day. Do not withdraw liquidity if you want to guarantee receiving XP.

How to do it:

  1. Go to web3.world/pools
  2. Connect your Venom wallet.
  3. Click on "Add Liquidity."
  4. Open a Liquidity Position for whitelisted pairs. A pair must be whitelisted (pairs that appear by default on Web3.world, not manually added tokens).
  5. XP will be credited at the end of the day (12 AM UTC time) as long as you continue to provide liquidity. The task will be marked as done.
